<mcversion>.1.1.2: More compatibility with mods, bugs fixed
<mcversion>.1.1.3: Added NBT tags to config, updated UI, bugs fixed
<mcversion>.2.0.0: New generator's features: Generation setting. You can disable fluid, mobs, saplings or chests generation; New JSON editor for blocksets config; Support for the metas array; Support for additional conditions for unlocking sets; Ownership and membership; Claiming free generator; Generation cooldown when block generating from non player. Bugs fixed, UI improved, foolproof, save of "One Block" world has mod's logo
